req.title: Fraud alert response
req.statement: A customer shall confirm or deny a suspected-fraud alert within 24 hours; unacknowledged alerts shall auto-freeze the account.

doc.reasoning: R-FIN-013 mandates time-bound fraud alert acknowledgment with auto-freeze on timeout and card reissuance on confirmed fraud. Test coverage targets: (1) Happy path—customer confirms fraud within 24h, alert closes, card reissued; (2) Negative—expired alert returns 410; (3) Boundary—alert at exactly 24h threshold; (4) State transitions—denial pathway; (5) Auto-freeze timeout. Heuristics: EP partitions response types (confirm/deny/timeout); BVA tests 24h boundary; STC covers alert lifecycle; NEG validates error handling.

tests.name: test_fraud_alert_confirmed_within_24h
expected: Fraud flag persisted in audit log
tests.executable:
import requests
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

def test_fraud_alert_confirmed_within_24h(base_url, auth_token, test_alert_id):
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {auth_token}'}
    payload = {'response': 'confirm'}
    
    resp = requests.post(
        f'{base_url}/alerts/{test_alert_id}',
        json=payload,
        headers=headers,
        timeout=5
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200, f'Expected 200, got {resp.status_code}'
    data = resp.json()
    assert data['status'] == 'closed'
    assert data['card_reissue_initiated'] is True
    assert 'confirm' in data['audit_log']

tests.name: test_fraud_alert_denied_within_24h
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_fraud_alert_denied_within_24h(base_url, auth_token, test_alert_id):
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {auth_token}'}
    payload = {'response': 'deny'}
    
    resp = requests.post(
        f'{base_url}/alerts/{test_alert_id}',
        json=payload,
        headers=headers,
        timeout=5
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    data = resp.json()
    assert data['status'] == 'closed'
    assert data['card_reissue_initiated'] is False
    assert 'deny' in data['audit_log']

tests.name: test_fraud_alert_expired_410_response
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_fraud_alert_expired_410_response(base_url, auth_token, expired_alert_id):
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {auth_token}'}
    payload = {'response': 'confirm'}
    
    resp = requests.post(
        f'{base_url}/alerts/{expired_alert_id}',
        json=payload,
        headers=headers,
        timeout=5
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 410, f'Expected 410, got {resp.status_code}'
    data = resp.json()
    assert 'expired' in data.get('error', '').lower()
    assert data['account_frozen'] is True

tests.name: test_fraud_alert_at_24h_boundary
trace: Customer response must succeed before auto-freeze
tests.executable:
import requests
from datetime import datetime

def test_fraud_alert_at_24h_boundary(base_url, auth_token, boundary_alert_id):
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {auth_token}'}
    payload = {'response': 'confirm'}
    start_ts = datetime.utcnow()
    
    resp = requests.post(
        f'{base_url}/alerts/{boundary_alert_id}',
        json=payload,
        headers=headers,
        timeout=5
    )
    response_ts = datetime.utcnow()
    
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    data = resp.json()
    assert data['status'] == 'closed'
    elapsed = (response_ts - start_ts).total_seconds()
    assert elapsed < 1.0, 'Response processing must be sub-second'

tests.name: test_fraud_alert_auto_freeze_on_timeout
actions: Wait or trigger background auto-freeze job
expected: Card transactions rejected with frozen flag
trace: R-FIN-013: unacknowledged alerts shall auto-freeze account
tests.executable:
import requests
import time

def test_fraud_alert_auto_freeze_on_timeout(base_url, admin_token, timeout_alert_id):
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {admin_token}'}
    
    resp = requests.post(
        f'{base_url}/alerts/{timeout_alert_id}/process-timeout',
        headers=headers,
        timeout=5
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    
    data = resp.json()
    assert data['account_status'] == 'frozen'
    assert data['alert_status'] == 'auto_frozen'
    assert data['auto_freeze_timestamp'] is not None

actions: Capture HTTP status and error details

tests.name: test_fraud_alert_unauthenticated_access
trace: Only authenticated customers can respond to alerts
